name: The Classic Anthem
vibe: The foundation of pop-punk. Upbeat, catchy, and high energy.

name: The Hardcore Stomp
vibe: Relentless and driving. The 'wall of sound' for heavy verses.

name: The Minor Descent
vibe: Dramatic and urgent. The major V (E) creates a desperate pull back to the start.

name: The Gritty Stomp
vibe: Raw, blues-punk swagger. Sounds tough and unpolished.

name: The No-Frills Rocker
vibe: Pure Ramones-style energy. Simple, effective, and loud.
